meaning: n.丹麦(北欧国家,首都哥本哈根)
examples: France swept to a 6–2 win over Denmark.
Denmark recycles nearly 85% of its paper.
France won by six goals to two against Denmark.
The pair have been kept apart in the seedings for Friday's draw in Denmark.
The seven winners of the play-offs will join hosts Denmark in the finals next year.
